jurisdiction: Prince William County, Virginia — Board of County Supervisors

primary_source.how_to_enumerate_meetings: Fetch https://pwcgov.granicus.com/ViewPublisher.php?view_id=23 — meetings are listed in collapsible year panels (2008–2026 confirmed). Each row exposes clip_id and event_id as query parameters on AgendaViewer and MinutesViewer links. A 'VoteLog' tab is also present on the same page for vote-specific search.
sample_document_urls: https://pwcva.gov/department/board-county-supervisors/live-video-briefs-archives  (county landing page — embeds Granicus via iframe)

second_source.system: Prince William County pwcva.gov Document Center + Agenda Packet PDFs
urls: https://www.pwcva.gov/assets/2021-05/BOCSMeetingSchedule.pdf  (sample asset path pattern for board PDFs)
second_source.what_it_affirms: The county's own CMS hosts separately-generated Agenda Packet PDFs (linked from Granicus rows as distinct S3-backed assets on pwcva.gov). These packets are produced independently from the Briefs/MinutesViewer HTML and can corroborate agenda item text and resolution numbers. However, they are attachments originating from the same workflow — they are NOT a fully independent legislative management system. No second standalone system (Legistar, PrimeGov, eScribe, a separate minutes repository) was found.

votes_located: Per-item votes appear in the Granicus MinutesViewer ('Briefs') HTML documents at https://pwcgov.granicus.com/MinutesViewer.php?view_id=23&clip_id={clip_id}. Confirmed example from clip_id=3856 (Jun 23, 2026): \"3.A. APPROVED: Approve the Minutes of May 19, 2026 1: Bailey 2: Boddye / Unanimous / ABSENT FROM MEETING: Vega Res. No. 26-378\" — format encodes disposition, mover (1:), seconder (2:), aggregate outcome, and named absentees. A 'VoteLog' tab is also present on the ViewPublisher page, offering keyword search across Motions/Votes fields.

systems_surveyed.system: pwcva.gov official county CMS (Granicus iframe host)
systems_surveyed.status: 200 OK — confirmed embeds Granicus view_id=23 via iframe; also links Agenda Packet PDFs

access_constraints: No authentication required. Granicus HTML pages are publicly accessible. AgendaViewer redirects to S3-hosted PDFs which trigger SSL hostname-mismatch errors in the crawler (granicus_production_attachments.s3.amazonaws.com) — those PDF assets are browser-accessible but not directly fetchable by this agent. MinutesViewer HTML returns fine. No Cloudflare or CAPTCHA observed on Granicus. The county CMS (pwcva.gov) returns 403 on some sub-paths (e.g. /agendas-minutes) but the Granicus portal itself is unrestricted.
open_questions: How far back does the archive pre-date 2008? The year selector stops at 2008 — earlier records (if any) may be on the legacy pwcgov.org SharePoint site.
The AgendaViewer PDFs (served via S3) could not be fetched due to SSL hostname mismatch — confirm their internal structure (item numbering, attachment links) via a browser.

The VoteLog tab on ViewPublisher.php uses JavaScript to render; its underlying data endpoint (likely a Granicus internal API) was not isolated — worth probing browser Network tab for a hidden JSON feed.

Does 'Briefs' (MinutesViewer) represent official adopted minutes or a staff-produced action summary? The distinction matters for legal record status. Official minutes may be separate PDFs in the Document Center.
The old domain pwcgov.org (SharePoint-based) appeared in search results — verify whether it still hosts pre-Granicus historical records or simply redirects to pwcva.gov.
